description: bata is a household name when it comes to footwear and this sandal tells us why - with its sleek upper and tough outsole. Brave the city traffic with this pair that's as hard wearing as it as stylish, at a reasonable price!UpperLeather forefoot and midfoot straps with an ankle strap looping around the ankleVelcro closures for the forefoot and midfoot strapsWaffle patterned nubs on the rubber footbedOutsoleTPU outsole with groovesSandal careUse a branded shoe polish to keep your footwear clean Do not store under sunlight
